headline: Royal Caribbean Cruises and Other Consumer Discretionary Stocks to Sell
summary: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Consumer Discretionary Exchange-Traded-fund is down 13% from its record high in January, while the S&P 500 has risen to new highs this month.

headline: Stocks Slide as Inflation Fears Lift Bond Yields

headline: Royal Caribbean Bets Big on AI to Enhance Margins & Guest Experience
summary: RCL is using AI to boost margins, personalize vacations and drive pre-cruise spending through its expanding digital ecosystem.

headline: Royal Caribbean CEO’s Make A Wish Role And The Investor Story
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises CEO Michael Bayley has been appointed to the national board of directors for Make-A-Wish America. The appointment highlights Royal Caribbean’s involvement in charitable initiatives beyond its core cruise operations. The news arrives as NYSE:RCL trades at $265.38, drawing attention to how investors may weigh the company’s broader social impact. For investors watching NYSE:RCL at $265.38, this board appointment highlights the non-financial side of the company’s...
